name: 明明如月
short_description: Rougelike map generation makes your every adventure different. Reasonable match of lineup, selection of talent and purchase of equipment will affect the success or failure of every adventure. Whether you can become the Savior of this continent, let's have a try.
detailed_description: This game is a unique round strategy game. You will operate up to 3 heroes to fight with various magical creatures. The roguelike map will make your every adventure full of surprises. The game gives players a high degree of decision-making power from two aspects of strategy and tactics. It is about the success or failure of each adventure to set up your adventure team, match a reasonable lineup, consider the talent, buy the right equipment, move correctly, change the hatred value and release the skills.
